description: Initializes the branch fetching routine, ‘NXTBRN_2’ or ‘NXTBRN3_2’ for returning branches connected to IBUS. For multisection lines, ‘NXTBRN_2’ or ‘NXTBRN3_2’ returns the other endpoint bus as the to bus. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.2.0. ierr, isect = inibrx_2(ibus, inode, single)

parameters.name: single
parameters.description: If 1, ‘nxtbrn_2’ or ‘nxtbrn3_2’ will return only branches for which the from bus (‘ibus’) number (or bus name) is lower than the to bus (or buses); if 2, then all branches connected to ‘ibus’ are returned by ‘nxtbrn_2’ or ‘nxtbrn3_2’. (input).

error_codes.description: invalid bus number; ‘NXTBRN_2/NXTBRN3_3’ may not be used.
IBUS not found; ‘NXTBRN_2/NXTBRN3_3’ may not be used.
invalid node number; ‘NXTBRN_2/NXTBRN3_2’ may not be used.
IBUS is not in a substation; ‘NXTBRN_2/NXTBRN3_2’ may not be used.
INODE is not in the substation; ‘NXTBRN_2/NXTBRN3_2’ may not be used.
INODE is not associated with IBUS; ‘NXTBRN_2/NXTBRN3_2’ may not be used.
invalid ‘SINGLE’ value; ‘NXTBRN_2/NXTBRN3_2’ may not be used.
IBUS is a multi-section line dummy bus; ‘NXTBRN_2/NXTBRN3_2’ may not be used.
